hero_subtitle: SFTY Business bridges fragmented compliance tools into a single operational layer that connects policies, provider outputs and audit-ready workflows for VASP teams.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to translate evolving policies into consistent operational workflows across multiple providers. This gap leads to duplicated reviews, slow onboarding, and fragmented risk visibility that complicate audit readiness and regulatory review.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY creates one unified layer that connects compliance policies, provider outputs and case workflows into a single operational system for consistent, auditable and scalable compliance decisions.
workflow_title: From policy change to workflow update
workflow_description: SFTY captures regulatory and internal policy updates then maps and applies them into operational workflows with reviewable steps and audit evidence.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented tools. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented provider outputs into structured workflows, decisions, cases and audit-ready evidence to close compliance policy gaps and reduce manual review risk.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs in closing policy-to-workflow gaps by preserving audit evidence and enabling scalable deployment with controlled access and bank due diligence readiness.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How does SFTY close policy and workflow gaps for VASPs
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how compliance policies translate into operational workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports fragmented provider reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare provider orchestration methods for consistent compliance control
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP compliance teams a connected control layer connecting KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, screening, cases and reporting into one operational workflow for consistent, auditable compliance decisions.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY close policy to workflow gaps?
faq_2_answer: SFTY maps written policies to automated rules that guide case workflows, reviews and approvals, reducing manual inconsistencies and supporting operational compliance matches current internal policies.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs, provider outputs and evidence packages with access control and audit logs to support defensible regulatory reviews and internal audit readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, connecting their outputs into structured workflows without disrupting current integrations.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but transforms their fragmented outputs into coordinated cases, decisions and reports within one compliance operations layer.
final_title: Close the gap between policies and workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects policy, provider outputs and case workflows into one controlled compliance layer.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
